meta.title: Consensus (median of aligned sources)
meta.source: Consensus of Boundless eBook + Skuad + Deel
meta.note: Per location and salary, the median of the available sources for cost and net, after dropping any value >10% from the median of the others. Europe: eBook/Skuad/Deel; US cities: our own direct calc; Rippling contributes employer cost only. Estimates for comparison only.
